title: WANDIC Paper Mache Box, Set Of 5 Heart-Shaped Mini Kraft Paper Boxes With Lids Ideal For Crafting & Storage Accessories Cosmetics Jewelry Gifts Home
features: ATTENTION TO SIZES -- Set of 5 heart-shaped paper mache box is of 5 different sizes: 6.5*6.5*2.5cm, 8.5*8.5*3cm, 10.5*8.5*3.5cm, 12.5*10.5*4cm, and 16.5*12.5*5cm. Product in the picture may look larger than the actual, please pay attention to sizes.
HEART-SHAPED DESIGN -- The boxes are designed in heart-shape, elegant and delicate, perfect for room ornaments or packing gifts to your love and family.
PREMIUM MATERIAL -- Made of high quality hard kraft paper, the storage box is sturdy and durable. Besides, kraft paper is easy to biodegrade, which is environment friendly.
FOR SMALL ORNAMENTS -- Wrap your gift in the delicate kraft box, add your creative hand-decorated decoration inside or outside the box, which looks elegant and exquisite, then show your love.
WIDE USAGE -- Perfect for packing mini bouquets, storing accessories, small electronics, cosmetics, jewelry such as necklace, bracelet, earring pendants, etc.
